---
name: Idea or wish
about: Suggest an improvement, workflow, or new capability
title: "idea: "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

## What is the idea or wish?

Describe the improvement you would like to see.

## Why would it help?

Explain the problem it solves, the workflow it improves, or the value it adds.

## Any sketch of a solution?

Optional. A rough idea, example, or mockup is enough.

## Extra context

Links, screenshots, related issues, or examples from other tools are all welcome.
